aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 从早期广泛讨论多个主题转向高度聚焦光子学上游和机器人整机，并对媒体负面叙事导致的市场过度反应形成强烈逆势交易认知
representative_quotes: I personally think $SIVE can be the next $LITE. In the past few months alone, we've seen... partnerships with O-Net pushing ELS into mass production... $JBL 1.6T LRO mass production signals... $GFS SCALE reference level laser for hyperscalers...

Retail thinks a 30-60% drop is a 'falling knife' where bagholders will never recover... I see it as long term ownership over the next hyperscaler with $NBIS, 40% of the InP supply chain with $AXTI, leader of the next optical shift with $SIVE...

Photonics is backed by actual revenue numbers and it's an architectural shift championed by $NVDA. Quantum barely has any revenue. $LITE is completely sold out for the next 2 years... $COHR is bottlenecked... All the CW capacity from independent players... are likely to become scarce resources.

key_themes: 地缘政治风险与能源安全

unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期从关注伊朗-美国对峙带来的能源波动，转向更多聚焦于AI与半导体行业的长期机遇。
representative_quotes: Iran's Revolutionary Guards Spokesperson: By interfering in the Strait of Hormuz, the US seriously jeopardized the security of global oil and gas supplies.
Jim Cramer: Tech feels like the only game in town.
BREAKING: Trump administration lifts restrictions on OpenAI's GPT 5.6, per Axios

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期从热衷2x杠杆ETF转为重仓正股海力士和康宁，强调去杠杆和风险管理。
representative_quotes: 康宁 $GLW 最大的魅力在于未来的确定性。英伟达让康宁扩产10倍，那么在投产后说明康宁业绩也要10倍涨幅！这是英伟达 $NVDA 给康宁的定心丸。
存储的地位一年内都难以改变，安心等海力士7月23号发的1300亿美金的季度利润财报。
海力士正股没有杠杆，跌成这逼样只能装死了。正股今天都回撤2m太几把惨。
